properties.query: INSERT INTO section (village_id, user_id, chap_no, section_name, content, video_url, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'ACTIVE')
SELECT * FROM section WHERE village_id = ? AND section_id = ? AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT section_id, chap_no, section_name, status FROM section WHERE village_id = ? AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY chap_no ASC

SELECT s.section_id, s.village_id, s.chap_no, s.section_name, s.content, s.video_url, s.status FROM student_section ss JOIN section s ON ss.section_id = s.section_id WHERE ss.user_id = ? AND s.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY s.chap_no ASC
SELECT section_id, village_id, chap_no, section_name, content, video_url, status FROM section WHERE section_id = ? AND status = 'ACTIVE'
